ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-23-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Staus Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stonemen appeared by telephone for Steven Barriere (Petitioner).

The Court questions where Mr. Barriere is and informed Counsel that she has no authority to tell her Client that he does not have to appear when an order to appear has been issued. Ms. Stoneman stated that Mr. Barriere is out of the Country until the beginning of the new year, that she has everything ready to go for him to sign, and that she will file it as soon as he gets back and signs everything. Status on close of estate and the order to appear are continued to January 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the petition is not filed by then, both Counsel and her Client are required to appear on that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Jan-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Staus Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
